feed.title: StayFresh
feed.subtitle: Static archive of workflow research and patterns for AI-assisted development.

entry.title: Claude Code Skills Stack
entry.summary: A practical three-layer stack for Claude Code: decision, context, and execution.

entry.title: Modular Workflow Stack
entry.summary: Right tool, right job, right time: layered orchestration, typed agent delegation, human-in-the-loop gates, parallelism, and loops with real halting conditions.

entry.title: Context Is a Budget
entry.summary: More tokens do not create more truth. Context should be spent where it changes the next decision.

entry.title: Protocol Before Personality
entry.summary: Shared artifacts and exit conditions beat charisma, cosplay, and fake seniority.

entry.title: Specs as Shared Reality
entry.summary: Agents do not share understanding. They share binding artifacts, versions, and tests.

entry.title: What is Prompting: Operational Constraints
entry.summary: Prompting is a constrained pipeline where tokenization, max tokens, and control tokens form the operational boundaries that determine agent behavior.

entry.title: StayFresh Thesis
entry.summary: The hard position behind the archive: reward surfaces, legible architecture, and tools that lower comprehension debt.

entry.title: Anubis in Front of GitHub Pages
entry.summary: How to put Anubis in front of a GitHub Pages site with a real reverse proxy and no proxy-loop nonsense.

entry.title: Instant Project Sync
entry.summary: Synchronize ticket queues against contract dates and repository evidence, with requirement reconstruction when docs are missing.

entry.title: psay Agent Notifications
entry.summary: Local voice and Notification Center loops for agent completion, handoff, and operator recall.

entry.title: Project AI Philosophy
entry.summary: A written position for bounded, evidence-backed AI use in delivery.

entry.title: Preference TOML
entry.summary: Use RLHF-shaped semantics in a simple config DSL for agent evaluation loops.

entry.title: Reward Rubric DSL
entry.summary: A small machine-readable format for scoring coding agent output.

entry.title: Prompt Patterns
entry.summary: Common prompt structures for reliable agent behavior.

entry.title: Agent Psychology
entry.summary: Understanding how agents reason and respond to instructions.

entry.title: CI Automation with AI Agents
entry.summary: Integrating AI agents with continuous integration workflows.

entry.title: Reward Engineering for Coding Agents
entry.summary: Why coding agents optimize the rubric more than the prompt.

entry.title: Reward Hacking in Coding Agents
entry.summary: How poorly designed metrics produce plausible but unstable code.

entry.title: AGENTS.md Effectiveness
entry.summary: Evaluating repository-level context files for coding agents.

entry.title: Formal Verification with Agents
entry.summary: Property-based testing and specification generation.

entry.title: Enterprise Agent Design
entry.summary: BCG framework for production-grade agents.

entry.title: Persona Anchors
entry.summary: Character-based instruction patterns for consistent agent behavior.
